allow: PowerShell($srcSize = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\src" -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Host "Total src/ size: $\([math]::Round\($srcSize/1MB, 2\)\) MB")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\src" -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="Size\(KB\)";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB, 2\)}} | Where-Object {"Size\(KB\)" -gt 10} | Sort-Object "Size\(KB\)" -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($nodeModules = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\node_modules" -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Host "Total node_modules/ size: $\([math]::Round\($nodeModules/1MB, 2\)\) MB")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\node_modules" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; @{Name = $_.Name; Size_MB = [math]::Round\($size/1MB, 2\)} } | Sort-Object Size_MB -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($packages = @\(\); Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\node_modules" -Directory -Exclude ".bin" | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $packages += @{Name = $_.Name; Size_MB = [math]::Round\($size/1MB, 2\)} }; $packages | Sort-Object Size_MB -Descending | Select-Object -First 40 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($androidSize = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\android" -Recurse -File 2>$null | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Host "Total android/ size: $\([math]::Round\($androidSize/1MB, 2\)\) MB")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\android" -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $size = [math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB, 2\); New-Object PSObject -Property @{File = $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\", ""\); SizeMB = $size} } | Where-Object {$_.SizeMB -gt 1} | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($build = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\android\\app\\build" -Recurse -File 2>$null | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $gradle = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\android\\.gradle" -Recurse -File 2>$null | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Host "android/app/build/: $\([math]::Round\($build/1MB, 2\)\) MB"; Write-Host "android/.gradle/: $\([math]::Round\($gradle/1MB, 2\)\) MB")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Joe\\Desktop\\Proj\\marooned-app\\android\\app\\build\\outputs" -Recurse -File 2>$null | ForEach-Object { $size = [math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB, 2\); New-Object PSObject -Property @{File = $_.Name; SizeMB = $size} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
